case_title: MACABENTA, GREGORIO B. vs. SHOWROOM et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-10-1996, CONTINUED TO FEB-09-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OR APPEAR RE: SERVICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACABENTA, GREGORIO B. AS TO DEFENDANT SHOWROOM CITICAR COHEN, FRANK MAHAFFY, ASSIEH DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-06-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-10-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-16-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-06-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-06-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-09-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-11-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED, AS WELL AS A DETAILED DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN SERVING EACH AND EVERY DEFENDANT. HEARING SET FOR APR-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
